name: Broad Street Realty, Inc.
summary: Broad Street Realty, Inc., an integrated real estate company, owns, develops, operates, and redevelops grocery-anchored shopping centers and street retail-based properties in the Mid-Atlantic and Denver, Colorado. The company provides commercial real estate brokerage services for owned and third-party offices, and industrial and retail operators and tenants. It also offers coordination, tenant improvements, and building services; real estate management and engineering services to property owners; strategic advisory services; asset management services; and construction services. As of December 31, 2020, the company owned 11 retail properties, including 10 located in the Mid-Atlantic region and 1 located in Colorado. Broad Street Realty, Inc. is headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland.
